title: Lyren's Home
description: Lyren asked for a proper home in town. The same house footprint can serve anyone. Assign her at the management block when the house is ready, then speak with her to finish the quest.

objectives.text: Receive the house plot token from Lyren.
Place and build the house prefab.
Assign Lyren as resident on the house management block.
Talk to Lyren to complete the quest.
